pan-roasted-chicken-with-harissa-chickpe.name: Pan-roasted Chicken With Harissa Chickpeas

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: a spicy North African red chile paste, is available at Middle Eastern markets, some specialty foods stores, and online.

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Heat oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high heat. Season chicken with salt and pepper. Working in 2 batches, cook until browned, about 5 minutes per side; transfer to a plate.

Pour off all but 1 Tbsp. drippings from pan. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring often, until softened, about 3 minutes. Add tomato paste and cook, stirring, until beginning to darken, about 1 minute. Add chickpeas, harissa, and broth; bring to a simmer.
Nestle chicken, skin side up, in chickpeas; transfer skillet to oven. Roast until chicken is cooked through, 20–25 minutes. Top with parsley and serve with lemon wedges for squeezing over.

pancit-sotanghon.name: Pancit Sotanghon
instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil over medium-high in a large pot. Cook 1 medium onion, thinly sliced, and 1 medium carrot, cut into 2"-long matchsticks, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened, about 2 minutes. Add 2 celery stalks, thinly sliced, and 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced; cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. fish sauce, 2 Tbsp. Maggi seasoning sauce, 2 Tbsp. soy sauce, 2 tsp. sugar, ¼ tsp. freshly ground pepper, and 4 cups water. Bring to a boil; cook until reduced by about two thirds, 8–12 minutes.

Add 3–4 oz. rice vermicelli noodles and cook, tossing often, until cooked through, 2–3 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in 1 cooked boneless chicken breast, shredded, 1½ cups snow peas, strings removed, and 1 cup thinly sliced cabbage (any kind). Divide among bowls to serve.

papaya-jam-pequerecetas.name: Papaya Jam

ingredients.item: 1 kg de papaya madura (pelada y sin semillas, unos 700 g de pulpa)

instructions: Pelamos la papaya y le quitamos las semillas.
We cut the papaya into small dice about 2 cm. Of 1 kg of whole fruit we get about 700 g of clear pulp.
We put it into a large pot with a thick bottom and add 500 g of sugar and 1 lemon juice. If we are to give a more intense smell, we also add the half-pods of open vanilla throughout with its seeds.
Let's clear up so that the sugar will be mixed with the fruit and let it rest about 30 minutes. At that time the papaya will release some of its juice and the cooking will start softer.

Encendemos el fuego medio y, cuando empiece a hervir, bajamos un poco la potencia para mantener un hervor suave. Cocinamos durante unos 40 minutos sin tapa, removiendo de vez en cuando con cuchara de madera para que no se pegue.
During cooking we can remove with a frying mog that forms onto the surface. That will make the jam more bright and better preserved.
When we see that the mixture is thick and darker, we have been trying the texture by put a teaspoon on a cold plate. If passing his finger forms a path that doesn't get together, the jam's ready.
If we prefer a more thin texture, we remove the vanilla pod and shredded with a handshake directly into the pot. If we love her with pieces, we leave her as we do.
While the jam ends with frying, we sterilized the pits and tops in boiling water for 10 minutes or at an oven at 120 been 3 been during the same time.
Let's put the hot jam into the pits, leave half an inch free at the top. We clear the edges with a moist cloth and close the tops well.
We put our pits face down for 10 minutes to make the vacuum. Then we put them up and let them cool completely without moving them.
Once cold, we put them in a cool and dry place if we have made the vacuum right. Otherwise we put them in the refrigerator and we'll have them in a few weeks.

pappardelle-recipe-with-neapolitan-ragu-.name: Pappardelle Recipe with Neapolitan Ragù
pappardelle-recipe-with-neapolitan-ragu-.original_name: Receta de pappardelle con ragù napolitano

ingredients.item: 200 gr  de pappardelle frescos o secos
300 g steamed beef (leg or bast), in small cubes
120 gr de panceta o tocino grueso
1 small piece of rib or flesh with bone (optional, contributes depth)
350 g shredded tomato or heavy tomato purée
1 cdote of sugar or honey (to balance acidity)
50 gr de queso pecorino o un queso curado similar
Un chorrito de leche o crema (opcional)

instructions: Calentar una olla amplia con un poco de aceite de oliva y dorar la panceta hasta que suelte grasa.
Agregar los cubos de carne y sellarlos por todos sus lados para concentrar sabor.
Incorporate onion, carrot, celery and garlic and drink till they are tender and add the red wine and let them reduce to evaporate the alcohol.
Add the crushed tomato, laurel, salt, pepper and a teaspoon of sugar or honey.
Cover the pot and cook with low heat about 1 hour and a half to 2 hours, stirring occasionally. The salsa should weigh and the meat get rid of them easily.
If the salsa reduces too much, add a water or broth chorrit. If you wish, also add the milk or cream chorrit to add more softness.
Cooking the dough to the dente, mingle it directly with the salsa and let it absorb the ragù for another one or two minutes.
Serve with grated cheese and a touch of lemon frying if you are looking for a more aromatic and fresh taste.

pasta-recipe-with-basil-and-tomato-sauce.name: Pasta Recipe With Basil And Tomato Sauce

ingredients.item: 4-5 rippers (rejected or cube mixed;can also be canned)
Half Kepç till cake watery u

instructions: 1. Magic boil plenty of water in a pot, add salt and sprinkle the cake in the harmony of the relative.
2. Take some pasta juice.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large pan, add garlic and roast 1 minute.
4. Get grated or spoonful and tomato paste pan.
5. Add dust sugar, salt and pepper and cook for 10 minutes in medium fire.
6. When it comes to sos swelling, add phenol and mix the cake until water until half bucket.
7. Take the honeycomb cake into the sauce interior and ensure that the sauce is well sticking to the cake.
8. Serve hot.
9. & Add grated parmesan cheese and fresh fesle leaves to the car and serve.

pasta-with-caramelized-onions-chili-oil-.name: Pasta With Caramelized Onions & Chili Oil
pasta-with-caramelized-onions-chili-oil-.original_name: Μακαρονάδα με καραμελωμένα κρεμμύδια & λάδι τσίλι
instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add some olive oil and butter.
Once the butter melts, add the onion and let it Caramelize by reserving all its sweetness and getting dark, for about 12–14 minutes.
At the same time, boil the pasta in plenty of salted water for 2 minutes less than the time recommended by the package.
When the onions look like jam, a sample of them softened and Caramelized primarily, add the paprika and garlic to the pan and sauce for 1 minute.
Add the cream and chili oil at will depending on the intensity we want.
Sprinkle with the grated parmesan and add the pasta to the pan directly from their pot, as they drip.
Mix and bottle for 1–2 minutes, filling some of the pasta water for a thinking sauce.
Add finely chopped parsley and serve immediately with extra grated parmesan.

pasta-with-sun-gold-tomatoes.name: Pasta With Sun Gold Tomatoes
instructions: Heat 3 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add tomatoes, garlic, and red pepper flakes, season with salt, and cook, covered slightly and swirling pan often, until tomatoes blister and burst, 10-12 minutes. Press down on tomatoes to release their juices. Remove pan from heat and set aside.

Meanwhile, bring 3 quarts water to a boil in a 5-qt. pot. Season with salt; add pasta and cook, stirring occasionally, until about 2 minutes before tender. Drain pasta, reserving 1 cup pasta cooking water.

Transfer pasta to skillet with tomatoes; set over high heat. Add 1/2 cup pasta water. Cook, stirring and tossing often, until sauce thickens and begins to coat the pasta, about 1 minute. Stir in remaining oil, cheese, and half the basil and toss until sauce coats pasta and pasta is al dente. (Add more pasta water if sauce seems dry.) Add remaining basil, season with salt, and serve with breadcrumbs, if desired.

pastrami.name: Pastrami
instructions: Mix vegetable oil and garlic in a small bowl; set aside for 1 hour. Combine black pepper, paprika, coriander, dry mustard, white pepper, and cayenne pepper in a large bowl; set aside.
Preheat the oven to 107°C (110 degrees C).

Cover a baking sheet with a large sheet of heavy-duty aluminum foil; coat with prepared garlic oil. Lay beef brisket on the oiled foil sheet and brush with remaining garlic oil. Cover brisket completely with pepper mixture, reserving 1 to 2 tablespoons.

Wrap brisket, fat-side up, in the sheet of foil. Place wrapped corned beef on another sheet of aluminum foil with the seam- and fat-sides down. Place double-wrapped brisket, seam-side down, on a third sheet of aluminum foil; wrap again.
Bake in the preheated oven for 6 hours.
Remove pastrami from the oven and let cool to room temperature, about 3 hours. Do not remove the foil.
Place foil-wrapped pastrami in a freezer bag or other plastic bag; refrigerate for 8 to 10 hours.
Preheat the oven's broiler and set the oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source. Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Remove pastrami from the refrigerator, unwrap, and place on the prepared baking sheet. Sprinkle top with 1 to 2 tablespoons remaining pepper mixture.
Place pastrami under the broiler and cook until surface browns, 3 to 4 minutes. Remove pastrami from the oven and cut into thin slices, about 1/8-inch thick.
Heat a large skillet over low heat; warm pastrami slices in the skillet with a few drops of water until fat turns translucent, about 5 minutes.

peach-caprese-salad.name: Peach Caprese Salad
instructions: In an 8-ounce screw-top jar, combine the vinegar and oil. Screw on the lid and shake well. Refrigerate until well chilled. The dressing can be made ahead and stored in the jar in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.
Remove the pits from the peaches and cut them into 1/2-inch-thick slices or wedges. Drain the mozzarella if necessary and pat it dry. Use a sharp knife to cut it into 1/4-inch-thick slices.

On a serving platter, decoratively arrange slices of the white peaches, yellow peaches, and mozzarella. Scatter the basil leaves on top, drizzle over the dressing, and sprinkle the flaky salt and pepper on top. Serve at once.

peanut-butter-blossoms.name: Peanut Butter Blossoms
instructions: Beat the peanut butter, brown sugar, butter, and ⅓ cup of the granulated sugar in a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium speed until light and fluffy, 2–3 minutes, stopping to scrape down the sides of the bowl as needed.
Reduce the mixer speed to medium-low. Beat in the egg and vanilla until well combined, about 1 minute.
Reduce the mixer speed to low. Beat in the flour, baking soda, and salt just until incorporated. Do not overmix.
Cover the bowl, and refrigerate the dough until firm, for at least 2 hours or up to 12 hours.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C) with the racks in the upper third and lower third positions. Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper, and set aside.

Place the remaining ⅓ cup granulated sugar in a small bowl. Scoop the chilled dough into 1½-tablespoon portions (you’ll have 18 portions total). Roll each portion into a ball, then roll in the granulated sugar to coat. Arrange the coated dough balls 2 inches apart on the prepared baking sheets.
Bake on the upper third and lower third racks for 8–10 minutes, until the tops are set and the edges look just lightly golden. The cookies should still appear soft in the center.

Remove from the oven. Immediately press a chocolate kiss into the center of each cookie. Let cookies cool on the baking sheets for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack, and let cool completely, about 20 minutes. Store the cookies in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 5 days. For longer storage, freeze them in a single layer until firm, then transfer to a freezer-safe bag or container, and freeze for up to 2 months. Thaw at room temperature before serving.
Enjoy!

peanut-dressing.name: Peanut Dressing

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Whisk peanut butter, rice vinegar, sugar, and soy sauce in a medium bowl until smooth. Whisk in water until dressing is the consistency of heavy cream (¼–½ cup); season with salt and pepper.

peanutty-marinated-cucumbers-with-curled.name: Peanutty Marinated Cucumbers With Curled Scallion Salad

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk together ⅓ cup creamy peanut butter, 3 Tbsp. fresh lime juice, 2 Tbsp. honey, 2 Tbsp. sriracha, 2 Tbsp. unseasoned rice vinegar, 1 Tbsp. plus 1 tsp. low-sodium soy sauce, 2 tsp. toasted sesame oil, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl until smooth.

Gently smash 1 lb. Persian cucumbers (about 8), ends trimmed, with a rolling pin until slightly cracked open but still retaining their shape. Cut into quarters lengthwise, then cut each spear in half crosswise to make about 2½" long. Add to dressing and toss to coat. Let cucumbers sit at least 10 minutes and up to 20 minutes.

Meanwhile, remove dark and pale green parts from 1 bunch scallions (about 6) and cut crosswise into 2–3" pieces. Cut each piece in half lengthwise, then cut each piece in half or in thirds, depending on their size, to create long, thin matchsticks. (If any scallions are particularly large, cut the matchsticks in half again. You want to end up with matchsticks that are relatively similar in size.) Place scallions and 2 medium Fresno chiles, thinly sliced, in a large bowl of ice water and let sit 10 minutes.

Drain scallions and chiles and transfer to a kitchen towel or paper towels and pat dry. Place in a medium bowl; add ⅓ cup (packed) cilantro leaves with tender stems and ⅓ cup chopped salted dry-roasted peanuts and toss to combine.

Using a slotted spoon or your hands, transfer cucumbers to a large shallow bowl or a platter, leaving excess liquid behind. Scatter scallion salad evenly on top; serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

pear-jam-recipe-lezzet.name: Pear Jam Recipe
instructions: 1. Peel the pears, nucleus and iri cubes.
2. Take pears, sugar and juice to a medium-sized pot, wait until 10–15 minutes; the pears will leave water.
3. Take the pot in the middle fire and leave the mixture to boil.
4. After you start boiling, cut the gold and cook for 35–40 minutes by mixing the intermediate.
5. When Reçel eye and dark swelling, add lemon juice and optional cinnamon, boil for 5 minutes.
6. Transfer hot re&ccedil to sterile jars and close the cover.
7. Reverse the jars to cool the mouth.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

peas-with-eggs-and-sausages-teleculinari.name: Peas With Eggs And Sausages
instructions: Cut the pig's shovel into cubes and season them with salt and pepper. Peel the onion and garlic teeth, pick them finely and praise them in a pot with the olive oil. Add tomato pulp, tomato cubes and meat and let cook for 10 minutes after starting to boil.

Retrieve the spices, add the sausages and bacon cut into cubes, water with the water and let cook for 25 minutes. After that time, add the peas and, if necessary, more water. Let it cook until everything gets soft.
No final, volte a retificar os temperos. Abra seis cavidades na mistura e disponha nelas os ovos. Tape o tacho e deixe os ovos escalfarem. Sirva de seguida.

peruvian-aji-de-gallina-traditional-reci.name: Peruvian Ahi De Gallina (traditional Recipe)

ingredients.item: 1 pechuga de gallina cocida y desmenuzada
4 fresh yellow beehives with no veins or seeds, minced
2 rebanadas de pan blanco sin corteza, remojadas en leche
1 taza de caldo de gallina o pollo

instructions: In a large pot, place chicken or chicken and cover with water. Add salt and pepper to taste and cook with medium heat till meat is tender. Remove the breast from the pot and let it cool before scattering.
In a pot, drink onion and garlic in oil till they are golden.

Cut the yellow ebes into two, remove the seeds and veins and cut them into small pieces. Add the hijies to the onion and garlic. Cooking at medium heat till the ingredients are golden. Add purified bread to milk, nuts and cumin. Mix well.

In a food processor or with a mixer, tighten the ajies, onion, garlic, minced nuts, cuts of white bread and evaporate milk. Add chicken stock little by little until the salsa has the desired consistency.
In a pot, heat up the yellow ham sauce with medium heat till it boils. Add shredded breast and cook with low heat for a few minutes so that the meat impregnates with the taste of the salsa.
Serves the chicken bean with baked white rice, hard eggs and black olives.

pesto-twist-pasta.name: Pesto Twist Pasta
instructions: Cook fusilli ( or rotini) in boiling salted water until it’s al dente. Reserve 1 cup (235 ml) of the pasta water before draining.
Add basil, garlic, pine nuts, salt, and pepper to a food processor or blender and pulse to start to break up the ingredients. Add water and a splash of the olive oil to get things started.
Scrape down the sides of processor bowl to ensure everything is being incorporated evenly.
Put the top back on, turn on the food processor, and slowly drizzle the remaining olive oil through the hole on the top of the food processor until emulsified in the sauce.
Pour the pesto into a bowl, then stir in the parmesan. (The heat of the food processor will start to melt the cheese, so adding it afterwards retains a nice texture)
Drain the pasta and transfer to large bowl or pan.
Add pesto and a splash of pasta water, stirring to incorporate.
Add parmesan and another splash of pasta water.
Top off with more cheese and basil before serving.
Enjoy!

phyllo-pastry-with-anchovy-lezzet.name: Phyllo Pastry With Anchovy
instructions: 1. Extract and salt light after washing.
2. Cut the Yufka into the kitchen countertop and in the form of 4 cm strips.
3. melt the butter.
4. Fold the butter on the dough and double the transverse.
5. Wrap in the form of flowers by turning on its own axis.
6. Cook for 10 minutes on the oven tray with oily paper mass and oven set to 170 degrees.
7. Visit the olive oil on the raw materials you have taken and share it on the softeners.
8. Place the red peppers that you cut in the form of stripes on the bases.
9. Bake slices of lemon according to request and cook for 15-20 minutes in hot oven.
10. Serve fine chopped parsley and red pepper.

pilaf-teleculinaria.name: Pilaf
instructions: Light a pot with olive oil and garlic and let it saute. Add the rice and let it saute well. Then add the hot water and season with salt and the blond leaf. Let cook for about 10 to 15 minutes, or until the rice has absorbed all the liquid. Turn off the fire and cover.
In another pot, saute the onion chopped in olive oil until it becomes soft. Then add the peppers, cleaned and cut into cubes, and let it saute a little more.
Acrescente o arroz cozido, as passas, as azeitonas e o queijo feta cortado em cubinhos. Envolva e sirva.

pineapple-glazed-ham.name: Pineapple-glazed Ham

ingredients.item: -lb. cured smoked bone-in ham or 6-lb. cured boneless ham

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°.
Stack 2–3 sheets of foil ample enough to cover ham on a work surface and arrange pineapple and orange slices on top in a single layer.
Set ham on fruit (if using a bone-in ham and it has a fat cap, score very lightly, making cuts about ¾" apart) and wrap up tightly.

Transfer to a wire rack set inside a large rimmed baking sheet and bake until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of ham registers 115°, 3–3½ hours for boneless, 3½–4 hours for bone-in.
Meanwhile, bring pineapple juice, vinegar, brown sugar, and hot sauce to a boil in a large saucepan.
Reduce heat; simmer, swirling occasionally, until thick enough to coat a spoon. Keep warm.
Remove ham from oven and increase oven temperature to 425°.
Unwrap ham, peeling back the foil so it covers the baking sheet (this will make for easy cleanup).
Once oven is at 425°, baste ham with warm glaze and return to oven.
Bake, brushing with more glaze every 3 minutes or so, until glaze is deeply browned and thermometer registers 125°, 12–15 minutes.
Carefully transfer ham to a cutting board and let rest 30–60 minutes before slicing.
While ham is resting, roast fruit, spooning juices over from time to time, until deeply browned, 20–25 minutes.
Serve ham with roasted fruit and cherries alongside.

pink-grapefruit-sugar-cookies.name: Pink Grapefruit Sugar Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
Red (or any color) gel food coloring and sprinkles

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Whisk together flour, cornstarch, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a medium bowl.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat grapefruit zest, sugar, and butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Add egg, sour cream, and vanilla and beat to incorporate, about 2 minutes (the mixture might look curdled, and that’s okay). Reduce speed to low and beat in dry ingredients until just combined.

Using a #30 cookie scoop (about 2 Tbsp.) and working one at a time, scoop out portions of dough and roll into balls (you should have about 24). Divide between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing at least 3" apart. Gently flatten cookies to about 1½" in diameter.

Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back halfway though, until edges are light golden but tops are still pale, 11–13 minutes. Let cookies cool 5 minutes on baking sheets, then transfer to a wire rack and let cool completely.
Do Ahead: Cookies can be baked 5 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.

Using an electric mixer on low speed, beat powdered sugar, cream, butter, grapefruit zest, vanilla, and salt in a large bowl until combined. Increase speed to high and beat until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Using a toothpick or skewer, add a small drop of food coloring to frosting, then beat to combine.

Spoon 1 heaping Tbsp. frosting onto each cookie; use a spoon or offset spatula to create swirls. Decorate cookies with sprinkles.
Do aAhead: Cookies can be frosted and decorated 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

pink-rose-cupcakes-argiro.name: Pink Rose Cupcakes

ingredients.item: 14 rose petals of course, not flowering - sprinkled
14 rose petals of course, not flowering - sprinkled

instructions: Place the white in a bowl and beat with wire to swell.
Brush the rose petals with white.
Leave them in parchment paper and sprinkle with sugar.
Let them dry well.

pirate-cookies-pequerecetas.name: Pirate Cookies
instructions: We put the flour into a bowl and add the egg, sugar, vanilla essence and soft butter. We start to mix with the yolks of our fingers, though at first it doesn't seem to be united, in a few minutes you will have a great and homogeneous mass. We pull and put between two vegetable paper and spread with the roller. We leave her with a half an inch thick or so.

Since I had no oval cutters, I did it at home, I have drawn three oval, 10, 8 and 6 cm of an acetate paper that I have cut. We put on the stretched dough and with the help of a knife we mark the shape and we cut the cookies, we will make the same number of cookies in all three sizes. The remaining mass will be put back together and we will continue to cut up till we complete the mass.

We have the cookies at the oven plate, at the centre we put up with the brush that we will later wear and we put them into the pressurized oven, at 180º for 10 or 12 minutes, as soon as the edges start to glow them out as they tighten as they get cold.

To prepare the pilling cream we put in a bowl the chipped chocolate with the cream and we remove until all integrated. We put them in a bowl and let them cool. Gather with eta cream and stick with each other.

That's all we have to do, and you can do your best, and I put them with a black drawing and I put them up with a little paper and I put them up with a little paper and I put them up and I put them up with a black. If you have a white tipster, you'll just have to paint onto the black one. We join with a little paper and get some paper and we stick with the 3 cookies.
Ready to scroll them seas looking for amazing adventures with our chocolate boat cookies!

pizza-teleculinaria.name: Pizza

ingredients.item: 11 g de fermento de padeiro seco
1 teaspoon well filled with fine salt
Molho de tomate para pizzas q.b.

instructions: Prepare the dough: place the yeast and sugar in a bowl, add 50 ml of water, mix and let it rest for 5 minutes.

Dissolve the salt in 250 ml of water and add the olive oil. Place the flour in a bowl, make a hole in the middle and pour the mixtures of yeast and salt into it. Start by kneading with your fingertips and then kneading very well until the dough is released from your hands. Form a ball with the dough, cover it with a cloth and let it leave for 2 hours and 30 minutes.

Depois de levedada, coloque a massa na bancada polvilhada com farinha e estenda-a. Disponha-a num tabuleiro de forno, barre um pouco de molho de tomate, recheie com as fatias de salame e espalhe as bolinhas de mozarela por cima.

Take the pizza in the oven, preheated to 250°C, for about 10 minutes or until the dough is well brown. Remove and dispose over some slices of ham, slightly wrapped, and arugula leaves. Serve right away.

polar-bear-cupcakes.name: Polar Bear Cupcakes
instructions: Place butter in a large bowl and cream until smooth with an electric mixer. Add cream cheese and beat until thoroughly combined. Mix in powdered sugar, 1 cup at a time, beating well after each addition. Mix in vanilla and salt until thoroughly combined. Pour in heavy cream and beat until frosting is smooth, about 2 minutes.
Take 1 baked and cooled cupcake and frost with cream cheese frosting, making as even a layer as possible. Sprinkle coconut over the top of the frosting, and shake off any excess.

Take 1 mini marshmallow and cut it in half horizontally using scissors or kitchen shears. Place one half of the marshmallow cut-side down in the center of the top of the cupcake, and press gently into the frosting to adhere. Take 1 black sugar pearl sprinkle and attach to the middle of the marshmallow half using a small amount of frosting; thus creating the nose and muzzle. Take 2 black sugar pearl sprinkles and place above the nose on each side for the eyes. Press gently into frosting to adhere. Take 2 whole mini marshmallows and place at the top of the cupcake on each side to create ears. Repeat with remaining cupcakes.

polish-sauerkraut-and-carrot-salad.name: Polish Sauerkraut And Carrot Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place sauerkraut in a colander and squeeze out all excess liquid using your hands; chop well.
Combine sauerkraut, onion, apple, and carrots in a large bowl and mix. Add oil and sugar and toss to combine. Season with caraway seeds, salt, and pepper. Refrigerate 30 minutes before serving.

pomegranate-broccoli-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Pomegranate Broccoli Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 medium you brocoli (insert to the subject, about 300 grams)

instructions: 1. Brokoli boiled boils up to 3–5 minutes in boiling salty water.
2. Do not let it soften; it makes the soul more tasty to stay light.
3. Then rinse with cold water and strain.
4. Add brocoli, delicate grains, walnut and red onion to a large salad bowl.
5. Wheat olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper in a container.
6. Visit the salad’s veuuml; and mix it to the gentle.
7. You can serve the salad immediately or offer it in the refrigerator for 10–15 minutes.
8.  Afiyet olsun.

pomegranate-apple-salad-with-greek-yogur.name: Pomegranate-apple Salad With Greek Yogurt
instructions: Ingredient Info: Orange-flower water, a flavoring extract, is available at liquor stores, Middle Eastern markets, and in the cocktail-mixers or baking sections of some supermarkets.
Preheat oven to 350°. Toast almonds on a small rimmed baking sheet, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Let cool.
Mix yogurt with honey, if using, and orange-flower water, if using. Top with apple, pomegranate seeds, and almonds.

pork-fried-rice.name: Pork Fried Rice
instructions: Combine rice, basil, oregano, and chives in a saucepan. Add water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender and water has been absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes.
Combine frozen peas, carrots, and corn in a microwave-safe bowl with a splash of water. Microwave, covered, until heated through, 6 to 7 minutes.
Heat oil in a large saute pan over medium heat. Cook and stir pork chops until no longer pink, 7 to 10 minutes. Mix in the cooked vegetables, rice, and soy sauce; heat through.

portobello-mushroom-and-rice-stew.name: Portobello Mushroom And Rice Stew
instructions: Melt butter with olive oil in a wok or deep nonstick frying pan over low heat. Increase heat to medium, add shallot and garlic, and saute for 2 minutes. Add mushrooms and saute until soft, 3 to 5 minutes.
Add chicken broth, rice, wine, carrots, celery, salt, pepper, and bay leaf. Cover slightly with a lid and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until rice is cooked, veggies are tender, and sauce is a nice, thick consistency, about 20 minutes.

portuguese-chicken.name: Portuguese Chicken
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Whisk 1 cup flour, 1 tablespoon paprika, 11/2 teaspoons salt, and 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground black pepper in large bowl. Add chicken pieces to seasoned flour, 1 at a time, and turn to coat. Heat oil in heavy large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken, skin side down, and sauté until brown, 3 to 5 minutes per side. Transfer chicken to plate; reserve skillet.

Arrange chicken in single layer in large ovenproof pot. Top with tomatoes and juice, prosciutto, onions, peppers, garlic, parsley, and bay leaves; sprinkle with 1/4 teaspoon paprika. Add wine and Port to reserved skillet. Bring to boil, scraping up browned bits. Remove from heat. Whisk in mustard and tomato paste; pour mixture over chicken and bring to boil. Cover; transfer to oven.

Braise chicken until very tender, about 11/2 hours. Discard bay leaves and parsley. Using tongs, transfer chicken and toppings to platter. Return sauce in pot to simmer. If thicker sauce is desired, stir 1 tablespoon flour and butter in small bowl until smooth paste forms. Add flour paste to sauce and whisk to blend. Simmer until sauce thickens to desired consistency, whisking often. Season sauce to taste with salt and pepper. Spoon over chicken and serve.

potato-salad-with-old-bay-and-potato-chi.name: Potato Salad With Old Bay And Potato Chips
instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot and pour in cold water to cover; season with salt. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer until tender, 15–18 minutes. Drain and return to pot to dry out; let cool.
Meanwhile, heat ¼ cup oil in a medium skillet over medium-high. Add onion; season with salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until soft, about 5 minutes.

Transfer onion to a large bowl. Stir in vinegar, mustard, Old Bay, black pepper, and cayenne. Add potatoes, potato chips, parsley, and chives to vinaigrette and toss to combine. Taste and season with salt and black pepper if needed; drizzle with more oil.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill.

pound-cake-cupcakes.name: Pound Cake Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat butter and cream cheese together until creamy; add sugar and beat until fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, beating until each one is blended. Stir in vanilla extract.
Combine flour, baking powder, and baking soda in a separate bowl. Gradually add to the butter mixture, alternating with sour cream, beating until blended.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each 2/3 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 20 to 24 minutes.

practical-cherry-pie-lezzet.name: Practical Cherry Pie
instructions: 1. Oil a cake mold with round 18 cm diameter.
2. Wash and extract the seeds and remove them.
3. Smoothly rub the eggs with pit coarse crumbs and powder.
4. melt and spark the Margarine.
5. Add both flour, yogurt, baking powder, vanilla and melted margarine to the sugary egg, and thoroughly whisk.
6.  Unload the dough caliba that you make.
7. Cook for 15 minutes without opening the cover in the oven, which is pre-heated to 200 degrees.
8. Download oven heat to 175 degrees and cook for 20 minutes.
9.  Take the oven and remove the reverse kek cake on the grill.
10. After cooling, cut to two.
11. 11. Wet both slices into plain plates and with gasosis.
12. Broadcasting on the bottom of the landings.
12. August Close on the other frame.
14 July Birer spoon vanilla and powder blend sugar and sprinkle on the turf with strainer.
15. Serve and serve.

prepare-the-green-chile-marinade-for-you.name: Prepare The Green Chile Marinade For Your Meals
prepare-the-green-chile-marinade-for-you.original_name: Prepara el clásico adobo de chile verde para tus comidas

ingredients.item: 250 gr de carne de cerdo en cubos medianos (espaldilla o maciza)
1/2 taza de caldo de pollo o verduras

instructions: It slightly steamed Serbian chilies, villages, green tomato, onion and garlic into a comal or frying pan without oil until they were tempered from the outside and soft from inside.
Retira la piel quemada del poblano, desvena y reserva.
It licks chiles, tomato, onion, garlic, cumin, oregano and a pint of salt till it gets a thick and homogenous salsa.
In a medium pot, heat up the oil and seal the pork till it's golden everywhere.
Agrega la salsa licuada, la hoja de laurel y mezcla bien.
Incorpora el caldo, baja el fuego y cocina tapado durante 35 a 40 minutos, moviendo ocasionalmente.
If you decide to use ground pipite, add it in the last 10 minutes of cooking to weigh and round the taste.
Ajusta de sal y deja reposar 5 minutos antes de servir.

profiterol-argiro.name: Profiterol
instructions: All materials must be at room temperature for perfect texture.
In a small pot, add the water, salt and butter. Heat in medium heat until boiled.
Once it boils, withdraw from the heat and immediately pour the sifted flour. Mix vigorously with a wooden spoon until the materials are well combined.
Add the pot over medium to low heat and continue stirring for about 2 minutes, until the dough becomes a soft ball, remove from the walls and dry slightly.
Remove from heat and allow the dough to cool for about 5 minutes on the counter.
Transfer the lukewarm dough into the mixer's bowl with the feather (not the hook). Beat at low speed for 2–3 minutes until the temperature drops.
Add the eggs to medium speed and add one by one. Every time we wait for the egg to be incorporated before we drop the next one.
Fill a cornet with the soft, sticky dough and cut its nose.
Lay non-stick paper on sheeting and form balls of walkut size, leaving 2–3 cm empty, because they inflate a lot.
Preheat the evening to 190°C in the air.
Bake for 9–10 minutes at 190 Then lower the temperature to 160
Let them cool completely.
After they cool, we drill them from the bottom (base) and fill them with pâtissière cream or any other cream we want.

puff-pastry-chicken-and-leek-casserole.name: Puff Pastry Chicken And Leek Casserole
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish.

Place chicken, carrots, celery, leek, peas, parsley, bay leaves, garlic, shallot, tarragon, salt, basil, and black pepper in a large saucepan. Stir in milk until blended; bring to a simmer. Cover saucepan; simmer for 15 minutes. Remove from heat; cool slightly.
Strain milk into a bowl; set aside. Separate chicken and vegetables into separate bowls. Tear chicken into bite-sized chunks when cool enough to handle.

Melt butter in the same saucepan over medium heat. Stir in flour until smooth; continue cooking and stirring until mixture thickens, turns golden, and becomes a roux. Gradually add strained milk, stirring until it becomes a sauce. Stir in heavy cream and Dijon mustard, then add chicken and vegetables. Remove from heat; cool slightly, about 5 minutes.

Pour chicken mixture into the prepared baking dish. Roll out puff pastry; place over casserole, overlapping to completely enclose filling. Brush pastry top with beaten egg; make several vents in pastry top using a sharp knife.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, 30 to 40 minutes.

puff-pastry-pizza-twists.name: Puff Pastry Pizza Twists

ingredients.prep: plus more if you like it saucy, plus more for serving

ingredients.item: Ranch or your fave dipping sauce

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).

Lay 1 puff pastry sheet flat on a work surface, and spread the top with the pizza sauce to the edges. Sprinkle with Italian seasoning to taste, then top with the mozzarella, Parmesan, and pepperoni (if using).

Place the second puff pastry sheet on top, and gently press down. Slice into 9 strips (about 1 inch thick) using a pizza cutter or knife. Twist each strip, and place on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Brush the pizza twists evenly with the beaten egg.

Bake for 18–22 minutes, until the pizza twists are golden brown. Remove from the oven. Sprinkle with the basil, and garnish with the grated Parmesan. If desired, garnish with hot honey and red pepper flakes.
Serve warm with more pizza sauce, ranch, or your favorite dip.
Enjoy!

puff-pastry-with-red-fruits-argiro.name: Puff Pastry With Red Fruits
instructions: Cut the vanilla in half.
Remove the pit and cut the vanilla into small pieces.
Remove the pits from the cherries and cut them into smaller pieces.
In a large bowl, add the vanillas, cherries, blueberries and blueberries.
Add the sugar and mix very well.
Set aside
Open the puff pastry and cut it with a sharp knife in four equal strips.
Then cut the puff pastry in half so that we have 8 equal pieces.
In a bowl, add the egg and beat it with a fork to homogenize.
Transfer the four pieces of puff pastry to a baking pan with parchment paper and with an egg brush round each piece of leaf on the baking pan.
Add some of the filling to the center of each puff pastry and cover with the corresponding sheet above.
We push around to stick the top and bottom sheet together.
At this point, with a fork, press the red fruit puff pastry pies around so that the top and bottom leaves are completely joined together and do not fall apart from the baking.
Add the surface and bake at 190oC for 12 to 15 minutes in the air on the medium grill.

puffed-rice-crackers-recipe-comedera.name: Puffed Rice Crackers Recipe
puffed-rice-crackers-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de galletas de arroz inflado
instructions: Vamos a iniciar la receta de estas galletas de arroz, lavando varias veces el cereal para quitarle las impurezas.
Deja escurrir un rato.
Vierte la taza y media de agua en una olla y coloca al fuego. Cuando rompa hervor, incorpora el arroz y cocina a temperatura media por 18 minutos.
Pasado ese tiempo, extiende el arroz en una bandeja y deja enfriar muy bien.
Just as long as I get room temperature. To purify your oven at 180 and 3.
Once cold, divide the mixture. At one, add the salt and stir. To the other the honey. That's how you'll make sweet rice cookies and other salads.
Take small portions of the mixture, make a little ball and then crush them into a cookie.
Coloca tus galletas en una bandeja con un papel de cocina y hornea por 45 minutos aproximadamente.
Pasado este tiempo, saca del horno y deja reposar.
Enjoy them with your favorite toppings!

pulled-pork-burrito-recipe-comedera.name: Pulled Pork Burrito Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  paleta de cerdo (aproximadamente de un kilo y medio)
800 ml de caldo de pollo o de res

instructions: In a bowl, it incorporates the 200 ml of barbecue sauce. Add the spices: salt, brown sugar, pepper, paprika, cumin, cinnamon, garlic powder and provençal herbs. Mix really well till you form a dough.
Si la paleta de cerdo es muy larga, corta a la mitad o en trozos.
Baits the pork with salsa very well and leave marines in the refrigerator for about two hours.
After that time, it incorporates the marinated paddle into a pressure pot.
Stretch the onion and add to the pressure pot next to the chicken or re stock.
Cover the pressure pot, lead to the fire and cook for about an hour and a half or till the meat remains tender.
When ready, with the help of a fork crumbles his flesh and removes his bones.
Mix the minced meat with the salsa that leaked the cooking and ready.
Warm the burrit, place the portion of the polished pork into the omelette and add lettuce, tomato, onion and cabbage to suit.
Enrolla el burrito y disfruta.

pumpkin-pie-bites.name: Pumpkin Pie Bites
instructions: In a bowl, mix the dry ingredients thoroughly.
Add the eggs and pumpkin, and mix.
Gradually add the evaporated milk, mixing constantly.
Preheat oven to 177°C (180˚C).
With a jar lid, cut 12 4-inch (10 cm) circles out of the pie crust. Press into each of the cups of a greased muffin tin.
Pierce the bottoms of the crust gently with a fork.
Fill each pie crust to the top with filling.
Bake for 20-30 minutes, until top of crust becomes golden brown.
Add your favorite ice cream or whipped cream with a pinch of cinnamon powder.
Enjoy!

pumpkin-pie-cupcakes.name: Pumpkin Pie Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 22 muffin cups with paper liners.
Combine flour, pumpkin pie spice, baking powder, and baking soda in a medium bowl. Stir milk, maple syrup, and ½ teaspoon vanilla in a separate medium bowl gently to combine.

Combine ¾ cup butter, white sugar, and brown sugar in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth. Mix in eggs, one at a time, until well blended, scraping down the bowl as necessary. Add flour mixture in 3 batches, alternating with milk mixture, beating batter briefly after each addition. Add pumpkin; mix until smooth and well combined.
Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each to the top.
Bake in the preheated oven until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 17 to 20 minutes. Cool in the tins for 5 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.

Meanwhile, beat 1 cup butter, half-and-half, and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract in a large bowl with an electric mixer until creamy. Add confectioners' sugar, 1 cup at a time, beating well after each addition, until frosting reaches a good spreading consistency. Mix in ground cinnamon.
Spread frosting over cooled cupcakes.

pumpkin-roll-cakes-lezzet.name: Pumpkin Roll Cakes
